query: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.countryId, co.name as country FROM cities c JOIN countries co ON c.countryId = co.id WHERE c.name IN ('Riyadh', 'Manama', 'Tripoli') ORDER BY c.name, c.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user BsRQq1X2Mh9kZmK.6749932367bb --database WqXabcMRQ5aEFJ4QyeefuN --execute SELECT c.id, c.name, c.countryId, co.name as country FROM cities c JOIN countries co ON c.countryId = co.id WHERE c.name IN ('Riyadh', 'Manama', 'Tripoli') ORDER BY c.name, c.id;
